ddls:
CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "address_line1" TEXT /* First line of the address */,
  "address_line2" TEXT /* Second line of the address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the address */,
  "state_province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state or province where the address is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the address */,
  "spatial_location" TEXT /* Spatial location of the address (geospatial data) */,
  "row_guid" TEXT /* Unique row identifier (GUID) */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the address was last modified */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the address location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the address location */,
  "geographic_region" TEXT /* Geographic region (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_state_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_province_id") REFERENCES state_provinces ("state_province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_provinces" (
  "state_province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state or province */,
  "state_province_name" TEXT /* Name of the state or province */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the state or province is located */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state or province */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_province_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_provinces_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_types" (
  "address_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address type */,
  "address_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the address type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the address type */,
  "address_type_code" TEXT /* Code for the address type (e.g., RES, COM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_usages" (
  "address_usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address usage */,
  "address_usage_name" TEXT /* Name of the address usage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the address usage */,
  "address_usage_code" TEXT /* Code for the address usage (e.g., BILL, SHIP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_usage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Company name of the customer (if applicable) */,
  "customer_segment" TEXT /* Segment of the customer (e.g., individual, business) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_addresses" (
  "customer_address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer address relationship */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the address */,
  "address_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the address type */,
  "address_usage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the address usage */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the address is the primary address for the customer */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the address started being used */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the address stopped being used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_addresses_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_addresses_address_usage_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_usage_id") REFERENCES address_usages ("address_usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_addresses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_addresses_address_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_type_id") REFERENCES address_types ("address_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., warehouse staff, customer support agent, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the address */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the address being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the address was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of an address */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the address */,
  "address_line1" TEXT /* First line of the address in this version */,
  "address_line2" TEXT /* Second line of the address in this version */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the address in this version */,
  "state_province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state or province in this version */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the address in this version */,
  "spatial_location" TEXT /* Spatial location of the address in this version (geospatial data) */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the address was modified in this version */,
  "version_comment" TEXT /* Comment describing the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_versions_state_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_province_id") REFERENCES state_provinces ("state_province_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_versions_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_modifications" (
  "modification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address modification */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the address being modified */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the modification */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the modification was made */,
  "modification_type" TEXT /* Type of modification (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the modified field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the modified field */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_modifications_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_modifications_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "address_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the address type */,
  "address_usage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the address usage */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the address started being used */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the address stopped being used */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the address is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_history_address_usage_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_usage_id") REFERENCES address_usages ("address_usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_history_address_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_type_id") REFERENCES address_types ("address_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_history_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_tags" (
  "address_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address tag */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the address */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_value" TEXT /* Value of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_tags_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_validation_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the rule */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of the rule (e.g., address format, postal code) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_validation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation result */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the address being validated */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the validation rule used */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date and time the address was validated */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the address is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_validation_results_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES address_validation_rules ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_validation_results_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)
